assertions.description: The power converters sheet contains two TL2575HV-ADJ adjustable step-down switching regulators (U1, U2), each with the classic inductor-diode-capacitor topology. The component type is correctly identified as 'ic', but detectors is empty — no voltage_regulators, switching_regulators, or buck_converter entries. This sheet has 1N5819 Schottky diodes, 680uH and 330uH inductors, and large bulk capacitors (330uF, 1.2mF) that together form a canonical buck regulator circuit. The same design also appears in hardware_Control_control_v1.sch (same components) with the same miss.
